## Description

A clear description of the feature you'd like.

## Use Case

How would this be used? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed API

```js
// How you imagine the API would look
ChaosToggle.myNewFeature();
```

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions you've thought of.
